name: Fragment of Friction
descs:
Activates when using E.G.O Awakening Skills that gain or consume [Charge] Count or 'Unique Charge'.

Gain Final Power equal to (Envy E.G.O resource + sum of other E.G.O resources/3) consumed and deal +50% damage

Envy E.G.O Skills: gain additional [Charge] Count Before Attack(ZAYIN gains +2 Count, TETH gains +3 Count, HE gains +4 Count, and so on), and deal +(([Charge] Count on self + 'Unique Charge') x 5)% damage. (200% max)
